kiroAgent.trustedCommands: Get-Content index.html -Raw | Select-String -Pattern 'localStorage|journal|trades|watchlist|settings|saveSettings|exportJournal|showNewTrade|addAlert|clearAllData' -AllMatches | ForEach-Object { $_.Matches } | Select-Object -First 60 | ForEach-Object { $_.Value }

# Fix links in index.html (was landing.html) - change href="index.html" to href="landing.html"
$c = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("index.html")
$c = $c -replace 'href="index\.html"', 'href="landing.html"'
$c = $c -replace "href='index\.html'", "href='landing.html'"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("index.html", $c)

# Fix links in landing.html (was index.html) - change href="landing.html" to href="index.html"  
$c2 = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText("landing.html")
$c2 = $c2 -replace 'href="landing\.html"', 'href="index.html"'
$c2 = $c2 -replace "href='landing\.html'", "href='index.html'"
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText("landing.html", $c2)

Write-Host "Links fixed"
Select-String -Path "index.html" -Pattern "Professional|Turn complex|Market Structure|High-confidence|showForgotPassword|oauthLogin" | Select-Object LineNumber, Line | Select-Object -First 20
